prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 5.0L twin-turbo V8 (internal code TFG V8) with billet aluminum block, reinforced forged internals (titanium connecting rods by Pankl Racing Systems, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons), and upgraded crankshaft with 100mm stroke for 5.3L effective displacement. Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with 80mm billet compressor wheels, custom 1.25 A/R turbine housings, and titanium wastegates. Custom Koenigsegg-developed dry sump system with 12-stage scavenging and external oil cooler by Setrab.

Hybrid System: Koenigsegg Direct Drive (KDD) with three YASA P400 electric motors (two on the rear axle, one on the crankshaft) producing 697 hp (520 kW) combined. Upgraded liquid-cooled battery pack (800V, 4.5 kWh) with custom firmware for 0.1s torque vectoring response. Reinforced single-speed transmission with carbon fiber torque tube and upgraded differential by Quaife for 1,500 Nm torque capacity.

Fuel & Ignition: Full Motec M150 ECU with drag-specific launch control (0-100 km/h in 1.7s), custom ethanol flex-fuel mapping (E85 compatible), and individual cylinder knock control. Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors with custom flow-matched nozzles, paired with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump system (brushless AEM 50-1200 pumps). NGK R8482-10 iridium spark plugs with 0.6mm gap for high-boost ignition stability.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber drag-specific body kit by Koenigsegg Advanced Composites, including a fixed rear wing with 1,200mm span and 300mm chord (optimized for 0-400 km/h stability), front splitter with active air curtains (reducing front lift by 45%), and rear diffuser with integrated parachute deployment system (G-Force Aerospace drag chute). Underbody fully enclosed with carbon fiber panels and vortex generators for laminar flow.

Weight Reduction: Full carbon fiber monocoque with titanium roll cage (FIA-spec, TIG-welded by CP Autosport), carbon fiber wheels by Dymag (20x11 front, 21x15 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/25 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear). Polycarbonate windows (Makrolon by Covestro) with anti-scratch coating, reducing weight by 18 kg. Interior stripped of all non-essential components, replaced with carbon fiber bucket seats by Recaro (Pole Position model) and 6-point harnesses by Schroth.

Exterior Styling: Custom matte 'Ghost Silver' livery with exposed carbon fiber weave (applied by Sikkens Autoclear), Koenigsegg 'Drag Spec' decals in 3M Scotchlite reflective vinyl, and LED underbody lighting by Osram (RGBW, 6,000K). Front grille replaced with a 3D-printed titanium mesh (aerodynamically optimized for intercooler airflow), and side skirts with integrated cooling ducts for the hybrid battery pack. Rear license plate deleted, replaced with a carbon fiber cover featuring a Koenigsegg 'Drag Spec' emblem in anodized aluminum.
